modules.module_title: Introduction to Beauty Industry & Professional Ethics

questions.question: Ek professional beautician ke liye sabse important quality kya hai?

options.B: Apne kaam mein hygiene maintain karna

questions.explanation: Hygiene maintain karna ek professional beautician ke liye sabse important hai, taaki clients ko infections se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Client consultation ka primary goal kya hota hai?

options.B: Client ki needs aur expectations ko samajhna
options.C: Apne salon ke baare mein batana
options.D: Sirf client ka naam aur contact details lena

questions.explanation: Client consultation ka primary goal client ki needs, concerns aur expectations ko samajhna hota hai, taaki unhe best service provide ki ja sake.

questions.question: Salon mein cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Ek hi towel sab clients par use karna
options.B: Tools ko disinfect aur sterilize karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination rokne ke liye, sabhi tools ko har use ke baad disinfect aur sterilize karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Professional ethics mein 'confidentiality' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Client ki personal details sabko batana
options.B: Client ki information ko secret rakhna
options.C: Client se koi baat na karna
options.D: Sirf salon owner se baat karna

questions.explanation: Confidentiality ka matlab hai client ki personal information aur details ko secret rakhna aur kisi aur ke saath share na karna.

questions.question: Beauty services provide karte samay gloves pehenna kyun important hai?

options.B: Apne aur client dono ko germs se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Gloves pehenna beautician aur client dono ko germs aur infections se bachata hai, hygiene maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Skin ka outermost layer kya kehlata hai?

options.B: Epidermis

questions.explanation: Skin ka outermost layer epidermis kehlata hai jo humein external environment se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Client ko kisi service ke liye allergy ho sakti hai, yeh kaise pata chalega?

options.B: Patch test karke
options.D: Sirf client ka age dekh kar

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi product ya service ko full-scale apply karne se pehle patch test karna zaroori hai, taaki allergic reactions ka pata chal sake.

questions.question: Salon mein first aid kit rakhna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Minor cuts ya injuries ko handle karne ke liye
options.D: Client ko gift dene ke liye

questions.explanation: First aid kit salon mein minor cuts, burns ya injuries ko immediately handle karne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Beautician ko regular training aur up-skilling kyun karni chahiye?

options.A: Customers ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Market mein naye trends aur techniques se updated rehne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular training se beautician naye trends, techniques aur products ke baare mein seekh sakta hai, jo uski professional growth ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Contraindication ka kya matlab hai beauty treatment mein?

options.A: Ek treatment jo sab clients ke liye suitable hai
options.B: Ek condition jo kisi particular treatment ko unsafe banati hai
options.C: Ek product jo bahut effective hai

questions.explanation: Contraindication ka matlab hai ek aisi condition ya situation jismein koi particular beauty treatment nahi karna chahiye, kyunki isse client ko nuksan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek professional beautician ko kis tarah ke attire mein hona chahiye?

options.B: Clean, neat aur professional uniform

questions.explanation: Clean, neat aur professional uniform client ko confidence deta hai aur salon ki image ko maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Ergonomics ka beauty profession mein kya importance hai?

options.B: Workplace ko is tarah design karna jisse injury aur strain kam ho
options.D: Client chairs ka color choose karna

questions.explanation: Ergonomics ka matlab hai workplace ko is tarah design karna jisse beautician ko kaam karte samay kam strain ho aur injuries ka risk kam ho, jaise sahi chair height, tool placement.

questions.question: Client feedback lena kyun important hai?

options.B: Services ko improve karne aur client satisfaction badhane ke liye
options.C: Client se baatein karne ke liye
options.D: Apne competitors ke baare mein janne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client feedback se hum apni services ki quality ko samajh sakte hain aur usmein sudhar kar sakte hain, jisse client satisfaction badhti hai.

questions.question: Sterilization aur Disinfection mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Sterilization saare microbes ko maarta hai, disinfection kuch ko
options.C: Disinfection saare microbes ko maarta hai, sterilization kuch ko
options.D: Sterilization sirf tools par hota hai, disinfection surfaces par

questions.explanation: Sterilization mein sabhi microbes, unke spores samet, khatam ho jaate hain. Disinfection mein zyada tar harmful bacteria aur viruses khatam hote hain, par sabhi spores nahi.

questions.question: Ek beautician ko apne client ke saath kaisa behaviour rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Friendly, par professional boundaries maintain karte hue
options.B: Sirf kaam se kaam rakhna

questions.explanation: Beautician ko friendly aur approachable hona chahiye, par saath hi professional boundaries maintain karna bhi zaroori hai.

questions.question: Salon mein emergency exits aur fire extinguishers ki location pata hona kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Emergency ki situation mein sabki safety ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency exits aur fire extinguishers ki location pata hona kisi bhi emergency jaise aag lagne par sabki safety ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Client ki privacy ko respect karna beautician ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Client-beautician trust build karne ke liye
options.D: Iska koi khaas reason nahi hai

questions.explanation: Client ki privacy ko respect karne se unka trust banta hai aur woh comfortable feel karte hain apni personal space mein.

questions.question: Oily skin type ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Large pores aur shiny T-zone

questions.explanation: Oily skin mein typically large pores hote hain aur T-zone (forehead, nose, chin) shiny dikhti hai excessive sebum production ke karan.

questions.question: Dry skin ke liye kaun sa product sabse beneficial hoga?

options.B: Heavy moisturizing cream

questions.explanation: Dry skin ko hydration aur moisture ki zaroorat hoti hai, isliye heavy moisturizing cream sabse beneficial hoti hai.

questions.question: Facial ke dauran steaming ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Pores ko open karna aur impurities ko soften karna

questions.explanation: Steaming pores ko open karti hai, jisse blackheads aur whiteheads ko extract karna aasan ho jaata hai aur impurities soften ho jaati hain.

questions.question: Combination skin type ko kaise treat karte hain?

options.B: Purely dry skin products se
options.C: Different areas par different products use karke
options.D: Koi bhi product use nahi karte

questions.explanation: Combination skin mein kuch areas oily aur kuch dry hote hain, isliye un areas ke hisaab se alag-alag products use karna chahiye (multi-masking ya targeted treatment).

questions.question: Sun Protection Factor (SPF) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: UV rays se skin ko protect karna

questions.explanation: SPF skin ko harmful Ultraviolet (UV) rays se bachata hai, jo sun damage aur premature aging ka karan bante hain.

questions.question: Acne prone skin ke liye kaun sa ingredient beneficial ho sakta hai?

options.B: Salicylic acid

questions.explanation: Salicylic acid ek Beta Hydroxy Acid (BHA) hai jo pores ko unclog karta hai aur acne ko treat karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Cleansing, Toning, Moisturizing (CTM) routine mein toning ka kya role hai?

options.B: Skin ko hydrate karna
options.C: Pores ko tight karna aur skin ke pH level ko balance karna

questions.explanation: Toner pores ko tight karta hai aur cleansing ke baad skin ke pH balance ko restore karta hai.

questions.question: Hyperpigmentation ko treat karne ke liye kaun se ingredients commonly use hote hain?

options.B: Hydroquinone, Vitamin C, Niacinamide

questions.explanation: Hydroquinone, Vitamin C aur Niacinamide jaise ingredients melanin production ko inhibit karke hyperpigmentation ko kam karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Facial massage ke kya benefits hain?

options.A: Blood circulation badhana aur muscle relaxation
options.B: Makeup ko set karna

questions.explanation: Facial massage blood circulation ko improve karta hai, muscles ko relax karta hai aur lymphatic drainage mein bhi help karta hai.

questions.question: Sensitive skin ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Redness, itching, burning sensation easily

questions.explanation: Sensitive skin easily react karti hai, jisse redness, itching, burning sensation, ya breakouts ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Exfoliation ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Dead skin cells ko remove karna

questions.explanation: Exfoliation dead skin cells ko remove karta hai, jisse skin smooth aur brighter dikhti hai aur product penetration improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Blackheads ko scientifically kya kehte hain?

options.B: Cysts

questions.explanation: Blackheads open comedones hote hain, jahan pore open hota hai aur trapped sebum aur dead skin cells air ke contact mein aakar oxidize ho jaate hain aur black dikhte hain.

questions.question: Aging skin ke liye kaun sa ingredient anti-aging properties rakhta hai?

options.B: Retinol

questions.explanation: Retinol (Vitamin A derivative) collagen production ko boost karta hai, fine lines aur wrinkles ko kam karta hai, aur cell turnover ko badhata hai, jisse yeh ek powerful anti-aging ingredient hai.

questions.question: Facial mask apply karne ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Skin ko specific benefits provide karna jaise hydration, purification, ya brightening

questions.explanation: Facial masks concentrated ingredients deliver karte hain jo skin ko specific concerns ke hisaab se treat karte hain, jaise hydration, oil control, ya brightening.

questions.question: Skin analysis ke dauran 'Wood's Lamp' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Different skin conditions aur types ko identify karna under UV light
options.C: Makeup application ke liye light provide karna

questions.explanation: Wood's Lamp ek special UV light hai jo skin ki hidden conditions jaise fungal infections, pigmentation, aur different skin types (oily areas fluorescent dikhte hain) ko reveal karti hai.

questions.question: Non-comedogenic products ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Jo skin ko gora karte hain
options.B: Jo pores ko clog nahi karte

questions.explanation: Non-comedogenic products specially formulate kiye jaate hain taaki woh pores ko clog na karein, jisse breakouts ka risk kam ho.

questions.question: Serum ko CTM routine mein kab apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Toning ke baad aur moisturizing se pehle

questions.explanation: Serum concentrated active ingredients deliver karte hain, isliye unhe toning ke baad clean skin par apply kiya jaata hai, taaki woh skin mein penetrate kar sakein, aur uske baad moisturizer se lock kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Waxing se pehle skin ko clean karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Oil, dirt aur dead skin cells ko remove karne ke liye, taaki wax better adhere kare
options.C: Skin ko thanda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Waxing se pehle skin ko clean karne se wax better adhere karta hai aur infection ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Hot wax ko apply karne se pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Uski fragrance

questions.explanation: Hot wax ka temperature check karna bahut zaroori hai taaki client ko burn na ho.

questions.question: Wax strip ko kis direction mein pull karna chahiye?

options.B: Hair growth ke opposite direction mein

questions.explanation: Hair growth ke opposite direction mein wax strip ko tezi se pull karne se hairs effectively remove hote hain.

questions.question: Threading technique kis area ke liye sabse zyada use hoti hai?

options.B: Back

questions.explanation: Threading eyebrows aur upper lip jaise sensitive aur chote areas ke liye bahut precise aur effective hair removal method hai.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad skin par redness aur irritation ko kam karne ke liye kya apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Soothing gel ya lotion (e.g., Aloe Vera)

questions.explanation: Waxing ke baad soothing gel ya lotion jaise Aloe Vera apply karne se redness, irritation aur inflammation kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Ingrown hair kya hota hai?

options.A: Hair jo skin ke andar grow karta hai
options.B: Hair jo bahut lamba hota hai
options.C: Hair jo bahut mota hota hai
options.D: Hair jo color change karta hai

questions.explanation: Ingrown hair tab hota hai jab hair follicle skin ke andar wapas grow kar jaata hai, jisse bumps aur inflammation ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Bleaching ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Hairs ko light karna taaki woh kam visible ho

questions.explanation: Bleaching hairs ke color ko light karti hai, jisse woh kam visible ho jaate hain, khaaskar face ke fine hairs.

questions.question: Waxing ke liye minimum hair length kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: 5-6 mm

questions.explanation: Effective waxing ke liye hairs ki length kam se kam 5-6 mm honi chahiye, taaki wax unhe theek se grip kar sake.

questions.question: Waxing ke baad exfoliation kab karna chahiye?

options.B: 24-48 hours baad

questions.explanation: Waxing ke baad skin sensitive hoti hai, isliye exfoliation 24-48 hours baad karna chahiye, taaki ingrown hairs ko roka ja sake aur skin ko recover hone ka time mile.

questions.question: Kaun si condition mein waxing avoid karni chahiye?

options.B: Sunburn wali skin par

questions.explanation: Sunburn wali skin par waxing karne se skin ko aur zyada damage aur pain ho sakta hai, isliye avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Hard wax (strip-less wax) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Yeh hairs ko bina strip ke remove karta hai aur sensitive areas ke liye achha hai
options.C: Isse bahut zyada pain hota hai

questions.explanation: Hard wax skin par soft hota hai aur sirf hairs ko pakadta hai, jisse sensitive areas jaise bikini line aur underarms ke liye yeh zyada comfortable hota hai.

questions.question: Threading karte samay thread ko kitni baar twist karna chahiye?

options.B: 3-4 baar

questions.explanation: Threading mein thread ko 5-7 twists tak karna chahiye, taaki woh hairs ko effectively grip kar sake aur remove kar sake.

questions.question: Bleaching cream apply karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Patch test karna aur instructions follow karna
options.D: Bahut der tak apply karke rakhna

questions.explanation: Bleaching cream use karne se pehle patch test karna zaroori hai aur product instructions ko carefully follow karna chahiye taaki side effects se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Hair removal ke baad skin par bumps ya folliculitis ko kaise prevent karein?

options.B: Regular exfoliation aur soothing lotions use karke

questions.explanation: Regular exfoliation dead skin cells ko remove karta hai aur soothing lotions inflammation ko kam karte hain, jisse bumps aur folliculitis prevent hote hain.

questions.question: Depilatory creams (hair removal creams) kaise kaam karti hain?

options.A: Hair follicle ko pull karti hain
options.B: Hair shaft ko dissolve karti hain
options.C: Hair growth ko slow karti hain
options.D: Hair color ko change karti hain

questions.explanation: Depilatory creams mein chemicals hote hain jo hair shaft mein protein (keratin) ko dissolve karte hain, jisse hair skin surface se break ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Waxing ke liye contraindication mein kaun si condition shamil hai?

options.B: Varicose veins (severe cases)

questions.explanation: Severe varicose veins wale areas par waxing avoid karni chahiye kyunki isse blood circulation par negative impact pad sakta hai aur condition bigad sakti hai.

questions.question: Manicure ke dauran nails ko file karte samay kis direction mein movement honi chahiye?

options.B: Ek hi direction mein, corners se center tak

questions.explanation: Nails ko ek hi direction mein file karne se unhein damage hone se bachaya jaata hai aur splitting prevent hoti hai.

questions.question: Cuticle pusher ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Cuticles ko gently push back karna

questions.explanation: Cuticle pusher cuticles ko gently push back karta hai, jisse nail bed clean aur neat dikhta hai.

questions.question: Pedicure mein foot soak ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Skin ko soft karna aur relaxation provide karna

questions.explanation: Foot soak warm water mein feet ko relax karta hai, dead skin ko soft karta hai aur cleaning mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Nail polish apply karne se pehle base coat lagana kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Nail polish ko jaldi sukhane ke liye
options.B: Nails ko discoloration se bachane aur polish ko chipkane ke liye
options.C: Nails ko lamba karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Base coat nails ko polish ke pigments se hone wale discoloration se bachata hai aur nail polish ko nails par better adhere karne mein help karta hai, jisse polish zyada der tak rehti hai.

questions.question: Nail fungus (Onychomycosis) ke case mein kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Normal manicure ya pedicure karna chahiye
options.B: Client ko doctor ke paas refer karna chahiye aur service avoid karni chahiye
options.C: Sirf nail polish change karni chahiye
options.D: Zyada pressure se clean karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Nail fungus contagious ho sakta hai aur professional treatment ki zaroorat hoti hai. Beautician ko service avoid karni chahiye aur client ko doctor ke paas refer karna chahiye.

questions.question: Nail buffer ka kya use hai?

options.B: Nail surface ko smooth aur shiny banana

questions.explanation: Nail buffer nails ki surface ko smooth karta hai, ridges ko kam karta hai aur unhe natural shine deta hai.

questions.question: Ingrown toenail ko prevent karne ke liye nails ko kaise cut karna chahiye?

options.A: Bahut chota aur gol shape mein
options.B: Seedha across (straight across) cut karna chahiye
options.C: Corners ko andar ki taraf cut karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Toenails ko seedha across cut karne se ingrown toenails ka risk kam hota hai. Corners ko zyada cut karne se nail skin mein grow kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Top coat nail polish ka kya role hai?

options.A: Nail polish ko base color dena
options.B: Nail polish ko chip hone se bachana aur shine dena

questions.explanation: Top coat nail polish ko seal karta hai, uski durability badhata hai, chip hone se bachata hai aur high-gloss finish deta hai.

questions.question: Manicure ya Pedicure ke dauran client ki skin par cuts ya wounds ho toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Service rok deni chahiye aur first aid provide karni chahiye
options.C: Sirf us area ko avoid karna chahiye
options.D: Client ko ghar bhej dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Cuts ya wounds par service karne se infection ka risk hota hai. Service rok kar first aid deni chahiye aur agar zaroori ho toh medical advice leni chahiye.

questions.question: Nail plate kis cheez se bani hoti hai?

options.B: Keratin

questions.explanation: Nail plate dead keratinized cells se bani hoti hai, jo nails ko unki hardness aur structure dete hain.

questions.question: Paraffin wax treatment ke kya benefits hain manicure/pedicure mein?

options.B: Skin ko deeply moisturize karna aur joint pain mein relief dena

questions.explanation: Paraffin wax skin ko deeply hydrate aur moisturize karta hai, blood circulation badhata hai aur joints ko relax karke pain mein relief deta hai.

questions.question: Disinfectant solution mein tools ko kitni der tak soak karna chahiye?

options.B: As per manufacturer's instructions (usually 10-20 minutes)

questions.explanation: Disinfectant solution ki effectiveness uske contact time par depend karti hai. Manufacturer ke instructions follow karna sabse important hai, taaki proper disinfection ho sake.

questions.question: Nail nipper ka kya use hai?

options.B: Nails ko shape karna
options.C: Excess cuticles ya hangnails ko carefully trim karna

questions.explanation: Nail nipper ka use excess cuticles ya hangnails ko carefully trim karne ke liye hota hai, par skin ko cut karne se bachna chahiye.

questions.question: Callus remover ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Feet se hard skin (calluses) ko remove karna

questions.explanation: Callus remover feet se hard, dead skin (calluses) ko soft aur remove karne mein help karta hai, jisse feet smooth hote hain.

questions.question: Diabetic clients ke liye manicure/pedicure karte samay kya special care leni chahiye?

options.B: Cuts aur infections se bachne ke liye extra cautious rehna
options.D: Unko koi bhi service dene se mana karna

questions.explanation: Diabetic clients mein cuts aur infections ka risk zyada hota hai aur healing slow hoti hai. Isliye extra care leni chahiye, sharp tools ka use carefully karna chahiye aur skin ko damage hone se bachana chahiye.

questions.question: Nail art brushes ko clean kaise karte hain?

options.B: Brush cleaner ya nail polish remover se clean karna

questions.explanation: Nail art brushes ko brush cleaner ya nail polish remover se clean karna chahiye taaki polish residue remove ho sake aur brushes ki lifespan badhe.

questions.question: French manicure ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Nails par intricate designs
options.C: Pink ya nude base aur white tips

questions.explanation: French manicure mein nails par natural pink ya nude base hota hai aur tips par white polish lagayi jaati hai.

questions.question: Makeup application se pehle skin ko prepare karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Makeup products ko waste karne ke liye
options.B: Makeup ko smooth apply karne aur long-lasting banane ke liye
options.D: Skin ko dry karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Skin preparation (cleansing, moisturizing, priming) makeup ko smooth finish deta hai aur uski longevity badhata hai.

questions.question: Foundation ka shade select karte samay kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Jawline par, neck ke paas

questions.explanation: Foundation shade ko jawline par check karna chahiye, taaki woh face aur neck ke skin tone se perfectly match kare.

questions.question: Concealer ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Blemishes, dark circles aur imperfections ko cover karna

questions.explanation: Concealer specific areas par focus karke blemishes, dark circles aur imperfections ko hide karta hai.

questions.question: Makeup brush set ko clean karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Hygiene maintain karne, product buildup hatane aur brushes ki longevity ke liye
options.C: Brushes ko naya dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean brushes hygiene maintain karte hain, cross-contamination rokate hain, product buildup remove karte hain aur makeup application ko smooth banate hain.

questions.question: Primer ka kya role hai makeup application mein?

options.B: Makeup ke liye smooth base banana aur uski longevity badhana
options.D: Sirf oily skin ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Primer pores ko minimize karta hai, fine lines ko blur karta hai aur makeup ke liye ek smooth canvas provide karta hai, jisse makeup zyada der tak rehta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa product makeup ko set karne aur shine ko control karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Mascara

questions.explanation: Setting powder ya compact foundation ko set karta hai, excessive shine ko absorb karta hai aur makeup ko long-lasting banata hai.

questions.question: Contouring ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Face ko ek hi color ka dikhana
options.B: Face features ko define aur enhance karna shadows create karke

questions.explanation: Contouring mein darker shades ka use karke face ke features ko define aur sculpt kiya jaata hai, jaise cheekbones, jawline aur nose.

questions.question: Blush kis area par apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Apple of the cheeks par

questions.explanation: Blush ko apple of the cheeks par apply karne se face ko healthy aur youthful glow milta hai.

questions.question: Mascara ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Eyelashes ko volume, length aur color dena

questions.explanation: Mascara eyelashes ko enhance karta hai, unhe dark, lamba aur voluminous banata hai.

questions.question: Day makeup aur Evening makeup mein kya difference hota hai?

options.B: Day makeup lighter aur natural hota hai, evening makeup more dramatic aur intense
options.C: Evening makeup sirf dark colors use karta hai
options.D: Day makeup mein sirf foundation lagate hain

questions.explanation: Day makeup natural light ke liye hota hai, isliye lighter aur subtle hota hai. Evening makeup artificial light mein dikhne ke liye zyada dramatic, bold aur intense hota hai.

questions.question: Lip liner ka kya use hai?

options.B: Lipstick ko bleed hone se rokna aur lips ko define karna
options.D: Sirf dark lipstick ke saath use hota hai

questions.explanation: Lip liner lipstick ko bleed hone se rokta hai, lips ko define karta hai aur unhe fuller dikhane mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Setting spray ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Makeup ko long-lasting banana aur ek flawless finish dena

questions.explanation: Setting spray makeup ko set karta hai, use smudge-proof aur transfer-proof banata hai aur uski longevity badhata hai.

questions.question: Color corrector ka kya use hai?

options.B: Specific skin concerns (redness, dark circles) ko neutralize karna

questions.explanation: Color correctors complementary colors ka use karke specific skin concerns jaise redness (green corrector), dark circles (peach/orange corrector) ko neutralize karte hain, foundation se pehle.

questions.question: Eyebrow pencil ya powder ka kya use hai?

options.B: Eyebrows ko fill karna aur define karna

questions.explanation: Eyebrow pencil ya powder eyebrows ko fill karta hai, unhe define karta hai aur overall face ko structure deta hai.

questions.question: Liquid foundation ko apply karne ka best tool kya hai?

options.B: Makeup sponge ya foundation brush

questions.explanation: Makeup sponge ya foundation brush liquid foundation ko evenly blend karne aur flawless finish dene mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Smokey eye look create karne ke liye kya technique use hoti hai?

options.A: Sirf ek light color ka eyeshadow
options.B: Darker shades ko blend karke ek gradient effect create karna

questions.explanation: Smokey eye look mein darker eyeshadow shades ko seamlessly blend kiya jaata hai, jo eyes ko define karte hain aur ek dramatic, smudged effect dete hain.

questions.question: Highlighter kis area par apply karna chahiye?

options.B: Cheekbones, brow bone aur Cupid's bow par

questions.explanation: Highlighter light ko reflect karta hai aur face ke high points (cheekbones, brow bone, Cupid's bow, nose bridge) ko enhance karta hai, jisse skin glow karti hai.

questions.question: Client ko greet karte samay kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Warm welcome aur smile ke saath greet karna

questions.explanation: Warm welcome aur smile client ko comfortable feel karata hai aur ek positive impression create karta hai.

questions.question: Ek dissatisfied client ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Unki complaints ko sunna, empathy dikhana aur solution offer karna

questions.explanation: Client ki complaints ko sunna, unke perspective ko samajhna aur ek satisfactory solution provide karna client retention ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Appointment booking system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Client wait time kam karna aur salon operations ko smooth banana
options.D: Beautician ko koi kaam na dena

questions.explanation: Appointment booking system client wait time ko minimize karta hai aur salon ke schedule ko efficiently manage karta hai.

questions.question: Product recommendations karte samay beautician ko kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Client ki needs aur skin type ke according honest recommendations dena
options.D: Client ko force karna product kharidne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client ki specific needs aur skin type ke according honest product recommendations dene se trust build hota hai aur unhe sahi products milte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein inventory management kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Products ki availability maintain karna aur wastage rokna

questions.explanation: Inventory management products ko stock mein rakhne mein help karta hai, out-of-stock situations ko rokta hai aur product expiration ya wastage ko minimize karta hai.

questions.question: Client ko service ke baad follow-up message ya call karna kyun beneficial hai?

options.B: Client satisfaction check karna aur unhein valued feel karana
options.C: Apne naye offers batane ke liye

questions.explanation: Follow-up se client ko valued feel hota hai, unki satisfaction check hoti hai aur future appointments ke chances badhte hain.

questions.question: Salon mein ambience ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Client ko comfortable aur relaxed feel karana

questions.explanation: Pleasant ambience (lighting, music, cleanliness) client ko relaxed aur comfortable feel karata hai, jisse unka overall salon experience better hota hai.

questions.question: Teamwork salon mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Smooth operations, efficient service delivery aur positive work environment ke liye
options.C: Competitors se aage rehne ke liye

questions.explanation: Teamwork se salon operations smooth hote hain, clients ko efficient service milti hai aur staff ke beech positive work environment maintain hota hai.

questions.question: Upselling aur Cross-selling mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Upselling better version offer karna, Cross-selling related products/services offer karna
options.C: Dono ka matlab extra products bechna hai

questions.explanation: Upselling mein client ko current service ka ek upgrade ya better version offer kiya jaata hai. Cross-selling mein current service se related complementary products ya services offer ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Time management skills beautician ke liye kyun important hain?

options.B: Appointments ko timely complete karna aur client wait time kam karna

questions.explanation: Effective time management se beautician appointments ko timely complete kar paati hai, client wait time kam hota hai aur sabhi clients ko quality service milti hai.

questions.question: Client record cards maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf client ka naam yaad rakhne ke liye
options.B: Client ki previous services, preferences aur any contraindications ka record rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client record cards beautician ko client ki history, allergies, preferences aur previous treatments ko track karne mein help karte hain, jisse personalized service provide ki ja sake.

questions.question: Marketing ke liye social media ka use kaise kar sakte hain?

options.B: Services, offers, client testimonials aur before/after photos share karna

questions.explanation: Social media par services, offers, client testimonials aur before/after photos share karke salon ki visibility badhti hai aur naye clients attract hote hain.

questions.question: Feedback forms provide karna kyun helpful hai?

options.A: Sirf paper waste karne ke liye
options.B: Client feedback collect karna aur services ko improve karna
options.C: Client ko busy rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Feedback forms client ke valuable insights provide karte hain, jisse salon apni services aur client experience ko continuously improve kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Professional appearance maintain karna beautician ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Client ko trust aur confidence dene ke liye
options.C: Apne colleagues ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional appearance client ko trust aur confidence deta hai ki woh ek capable aur hygienic professional se service le rahe hain.

questions.question: Salon mein product display kaise hona chahiye?

options.B: Neatly organized, well-lit aur attractive tarike se
options.C: Sirf un products ko display karna jo bik na rahe hon
options.D: Client ki reach se bahar rakhna

questions.explanation: Well-organized aur attractive product display clients ko products browse karne aur purchase karne ke liye encourage karta hai.

questions.question: Cash handling aur billing mein kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Accuracy aur transparency maintain karna

questions.explanation: Cash handling aur billing mein accuracy aur transparency maintain karna zaroori hai taaki koi discrepancy na ho aur client trust bana rahe.
